title: DONATION CENTER - 211info
text: FURNISH HOPE DONATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accept donations of new or gently used household items, including kitchen basics such as dishes, glassware, bakeware, small appliances, utensils, pots, pans, home furniture, bedding, and cleaning supplies. 1006 SE 9th Street Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Drop off: Monday-Saturday 9am-11am Pick up: Varies (541) 638-0657 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 638-0657 INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Donations: Visit website for list of accepted items -Drop off: Walk in -Pick up: Visit website to complet online request form FEES: Drop off: None Pick up: Sliding scale donation requested DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Donation Center Services: Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Cleaning Product Donation Programs Donation Pickups Electronics/Small Appliance Donation Programs Furniture/Home Furnishings Donation Programs Kitchenware Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - FURNISH HOPE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FURNISH HOPE
